Contact Us

Get in touch with the Weight Loss Percentage team.

Get in Touch with Our Team

We value feedback and questions from our users. If you have inquiries about our calculators, notice any bugs, or want to suggest new health tools, please reach out to us.

Our clinical team is always open to feedback to ensure our formulas match the gold standards of medical research. Please note that we cannot provide personalized medical advice or treatment plans.

Fill out our contact form or email us directly, and our support team will respond as quickly as possible, typically within 24 to 48 hours.

Medical Disclaimer: The calculators and information provided on Weight Loss Percentage are for educational purposes only and are not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always consult with a qualified healthcare provider before making significant changes to your diet, exercise routine, or health plan.

Get In Touch

Have questions, feedback, or need help? We'd love to hear from you.
